Functions for app rendering, event loops, and retrieving the AppInstallId in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file defines functions and includes necessary headers for managing application rendering and event loops. It includes `gtypes.h` and `app_install_types.h` to provide necessary type definitions. The function [`app_request_render`](<#app_request_render>) schedules the top window of an application to be re-rendered. The [`app_event_loop_common`](<#app_event_loop_common>) function is a shared event loop used by both Rocky.js and C applications. The [`app_event_loop`](<#app_event_loop>) function is designed for use in the `main()` function of C applications and will block execution until the application is ready to exit. Additionally, the function [`app_get_app_id`](<#app_get_app_id>) retrieves the `AppInstallId` for the current application or worker.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
- `process_management/app_install_types.h`
